title: The GAN Minimax Objective, in Plain Words
concept: In a GAN, the discriminator tries to maximize how often it correctly spots real vs. fake, while the generator tries to minimize the discriminator's success — pulling on the very same score from opposite directions.

exercises.prompt: Recap: In a minimax game, what happens to the shared score?

options.text: One player pushes it up, the other pushes it down, until things settle into a balance
Both players always push it in the same direction
The score is irrelevant to both players

exercises.explain: Right! One minimizes, one maximizes, and the tug-of-war settles into a balance. Now let's meet the two AI players who do exactly this.

cards.title: Meet the two players
cards.body: Every GAN has two neural networks locked in the same tug-of-war we just saw: the generator, which creates fake data, and the discriminator, which judges real from fake. They share one scoreboard — the discriminator's accuracy.

cards.title: The GAN minimax objective, in plain words
cards.body: The discriminator tries to maximize its accuracy at correctly labeling real data as real and fake data as fake. The generator tries to minimize that same accuracy on its fakes — in other words, it tries to maximize how often it confuses the discriminator.

cards.title: The spam filter arms race
cards.body: Think of an email spam filter (maximizing how many spam emails it correctly catches) versus a spammer constantly rewording messages to slip past it (minimizing the filter's catch rate). Same inbox, same scoreboard, opposite goals.

cards.title: Watching the scoreboard move
cards.body: Early in training, the discriminator might correctly spot the generator's fakes 9 times out of 10 (high accuracy — it's winning). As the generator improves its fakes, that catch rate starts dropping round after round, exactly as the generator intends.

cards.title: They aren't just doing separate jobs
cards.body: You might think the generator and discriminator are simply working on unrelated tasks — one makes images, one sorts them. In reality, they're locked onto the very same number (the discriminator's accuracy), each pulling it in an opposite direction. That shared tug is what makes it a minimax objective.

cards.title: Who maximizes, who minimizes?
cards.body: The same accuracy score, pulled two ways:

left.text:
MAXIMIZES its own accuracy
Wants to correctly spot
real vs. fake every time

right.text:
MINIMIZES that accuracy
Wants its fakes to slip
past undetected

exercises.prompt: What is the discriminator trying to maximize?

options.text: Its accuracy at correctly telling real data from the generator's fakes
The number of fake images it creates
The size of the training dataset

exercises.explain: The discriminator's whole goal is maximizing correct real-vs-fake calls.

exercises.prompt: True or false: The generator wants to maximize the discriminator's accuracy on its fakes.
exercises.explain: False. The generator wants to minimize the discriminator's accuracy on fakes — that means more of its fakes slip through as 'real.'

exercises.sentence: The generator's minimax goal is to ___ the discriminator's ability to correctly spot its fakes.
exercises.explain: The generator wants the discriminator's success rate on its fakes to shrink, which means it's minimizing that value.

exercises.prompt: Which statement correctly describes the GAN minimax objective in plain words?

options.text: Discriminator maximizes correct real/fake calls; generator minimizes the discriminator's success on its fakes
Both networks maximize the exact same thing at the exact same time
The generator's only goal is to maximize the size of its output images

exercises.explain: One network pushes the shared accuracy score up, the other pushes it down — exactly the minimax pattern from last lesson.

exercises.prompt: A discriminator starts out catching 95% of a generator's fakes. After many rounds of training, that catch rate drops to 60%. What does this tell you about the minimax objective in action?

options.text: The generator is successfully minimizing the discriminator's accuracy on fakes, exactly as its side of the objective intends
The discriminator is broken and needs to be restarted
The generator and discriminator have stopped training entirely
The discriminator is now maximizing its accuracy

exercises.explain: Exactly! A dropping catch rate is the generator winning its side of the minimax tug-of-war. Next up: where does this back-and-forth eventually settle?
